attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT WPT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
, WPT.DISTI_TO_RESELLER_SO_NUMBER
, WPT.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PROD_PRICE_AMT
, WPT.TRANSACTION_DATE
, WPT.GLBL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT
, WPT.GLBO_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_LCL_AMT
, WPT.DIST_RPTD_SALES_REP_NAME
, WPT.DIST_RPTD_CISCO_SO_NUM
, WPT.DISTI_SO_LINE_NUMBER
, WPT.DISTI_2_CISCO_PO_NUMBER
, WPT.WHLSL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT
, WPT.WHSL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_LCL_AMT
, WPT.DISTI_SBMTD_CISCO_CONTRACT_NUM
, WPT.DST_SBMTD_CSCO_CTRCT_TYP_DESCR
, WPT.DISTI_2_DISTI_TRX_FLAG
, WPT.DISTRIBUTOR_REPORTED_DEAL_ID
, WPT.DISTRIBUTOR_PART_NUMBER
, WPT.DROP_SHIP_FLAG
, WPT.DISTI_RPTD_END_CUST_VAT_NUMBER
, WPT.DIST_RPTD_END_USR_EML_CT_NAME
, WPT.DIST_RPTD_END_USR_CONTACT_NAME
, WPT.DIST_RPTD_END_USR_CT_TEL_NUM
, WPT.END_CUST_TO_RESELLER_PO_NUM
, WPT.EXPORT_REFERENCE_NUMBER
, WPT.INSTALLATION_AMOUNT
, WPT.DISTRIBUTOR_INVOICE_NUMBER
, WPT.MAINTENANCE_AMOUNT
, WPT.MANAGED_SERVICE_AMOUNT
, WPT.MARKET_TYPE_CODE
, WPT.OFFICIAL_SALE_FLAG
, WPT.OTHER_CONSULTING_AMOUNT
, WPT.PRODUCT_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
, WPT.POS_TRX_LINE_PRODUCT_QUANT
, WPT.LINKSYS_FLAG
, WPT.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE
, WPT.PROFESSIONAL_SERVICE_AMOUNT
, WPT.RPTD_EXTENDED_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT
, WPT.RPTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT
, WPT.RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT
, WPT.RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT
, WPT.SVC_CONTRACT_CENTER_QUOTE_NUM
, WPT.SECOND_SOURCE_FLAG
, WPT.DST_RPTD_2ND_SRC_DST_CTRY_CODE
, WPT.DISTI_RPTD_2ND_SRC_DISTI_NAME
, WPT.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER
, WPT.DISTRIBUTOR_SHIP_DATE
, WPT.SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_PERCENTAGE
, WPT.POS_TRX_LINE_ACTIVE_FLAG
, WPT.TRANSPORT_AMOUNT
, WPT.VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT
, WPT.VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT
, WPT.VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT
, WPT.VALUATION_PRICE_LOCAL_AMOUNT
, WPT.DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE_NUMBER
, WPT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE
, WPT.POS_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CODE
, WPT.PROMOTION_NAME
, WPT.DISTI_RPTD_COST_UNIT_PRICE_AMT
, WPT.DISTI_RPTD_PROMOTION_NAME
, WPT.DISTI_RPTD_PROMOTION_TYPE_CODE
, WPT.POS_TRX_REBILL_FLAG
, WPT.RU_CAD_PO_NUMBER
, WPT.RU_RSLR_TO_DISTI_ACCOUT_NUMBER
, WPT.RU_RSLR_TO_DISTI_PO_NUMBER
, WPT.RU_DISTI_RPTD_SALES_ORDER_DATE
, WPT.RU_MANAGED_SERVICE_TYPE_CODE
, WPT.RU_SOLUTION_ID
, WPT.RU_SOLUTION_SOLD_DATE
, WPT.RU_SOLUTION_LENGTH_INT
, WPT.RU_DISTI_TO_SP_INVOICE_NUMBER
, WPT.RU_SP_TO_END_USER_INVOICE_NUM
, WPT.RU_RET_ORIG_BS_LST_U_PRICE_AMT
, WPT.RU_RET_ORIG_CST_U_PRICE_AMT
, WPT.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_SO_NUM
, WPT.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI2RSLR_INV_NUM
, WPT.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_INV_NUM
, WPT.DISTI_RPTD_CAM_NAME
, WPT.DISTI_RPTD_DISTI_WHSE_NUM
, WPT.BK_CAM_PARTY_KEY
, WPT.BK_DEAL_ID
, WPT.BK_LOCAL_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE
, WPT.BK_REBILL_POS_TRANSACTION_ID
, WPT.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
, WPT.BK_SECONDARY_RESELLER_ID
, WPT.RU_BK_RET_POS_TRANSACTION_ID
, WPT.POS_SOURCE_TYPE
, WPT.ELIG_FOR_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE
, WPT.RU_ALLOCATED_TYPE
, WPT.POS_RETURN_ROLE
, WPT.EDW_CREATE_USER
, WPT.EDW_UPDATE_USER
, WPT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
, WPT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
, WPT.BATCH_ID_INT
, WPT.PRODUCT_KEY
, WPT.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
, WPT.BK_BILL_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
, WPT.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
, WPT.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
, WPT.SOLD_TO_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
, PSPK.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
, WPT.SOLDTO_CONTACT_EMAIL
, WPT.REPORTED_RESELLER_CERT
, WPT.DUP_POS_TRANS
, WPT.SERIAL_NUMBER_STATUS_SUMMARY
, WPT.SOLDTO_CONTACT_TEL
, WPT.SOLDTO_CONTACT_NAME
, WPT.SERVICE_SO_NUM
, WPT.REPORTED_PARTNER_ID
, WPT.ADJUSTED_FLAG
, WPT.CISCO_TO_SP_SO_NUM
, WPT.ORIG_BATCH_ID
, WPT.SERVICE_PROVIDER_NAME
, -999 AS OPPORTUNITY_KEY
, WPT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
, WPT.CISCO_TO_SP_PO_NUM
, WPT.CERTIFICATION
, WPT.RESELLER_AREA
, WPT.ENDUSER_AREA
, WPT.PDB_PARTNER_ID
, WPT.PDB_PARTNER_STATUS
, Coalesce(WPT.PDB_PARTNER_TYPE, 'UNKNOWN')
, Coalesce(WPT.VERTICAL_MARKET, 'UNKNOWN')
, WPT.PRE_UP_VAL_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LC
, WPT.PRE_UP_VAL_NET_UNIT_PRICE
,WPT.GROSS_POS_REVALUED_USD_AMT
, Coalesce(WPT.BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT, -9999)
,Coalesce(WPT.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD, 'UNKNOWN')
, Coalesce(WPT.BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT, -9999)
, WPT.LINE_STATUS_CD
,WPT.PRDT_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT
, WPT.ACTION_CODE
, WPT.DML_TYPE 
/* Modified as part of SFP Rel : BKG POS TV ETL, wf_W_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE_TV failing frequently in TS3 due to data issue */
,
CASE WHEN EL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN 
	EL.DV_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
ELSE 
	Coalesce(NSOLNRT.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,  Cast('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) 
END AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
,
CASE WHEN EL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN 
	EL.DV_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
ELSE 
	Coalesce(NSOLNRT.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,  Cast('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) 
END AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
/* Added as part of CG1 MARCH REL*/
CASE WHEN EL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN 
	ROUND(MONTHS_BETWEEN(DV_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,DV_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM))
ELSE 
CASE WHEN IS_SERVICE_CONTRACT_POS_FLG = 'Y' THEN 
case when COALESCE(WPT.SERVICE_PERIOD,'MO') IN 'DAY' THEN  (COALESCE(WPT.DURATION,0.000000)/365.00)*12.00 /*To convert days to months*/
            when COALESCE(WPT.SERVICE_PERIOD,'MO') IN 'YR' THEN  (COALESCE(WPT.DURATION,0.000000))*12.00 /*To convert years to months*/
            ELSE COALESCE(WPT.DURATION,0.000000) END 
ELSE Coalesce(NSOLNRT.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT,-999.000000) END
END  AS RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT,
/* Added as part of SFP  Rel */
Cast(WPT.ORG_DISTI_RESELLER_SOL  AS VARCHAR(50)) AS DISTRI_EXTERNAL_SOL_NUM
,WPT.MAGIC_KEY AS MAGIC_KEY_ID
,WPT.INTERNAL_POS_FLAG AS CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG
,WPT.NET_PRICE_FLAG AS NET_PRICE_FLG
,'N' AS IS_SERVICE_CONTRACT_POS_FLG
,Cast((
CASE
WHEN NSOL.SS_CODE = 'CG' THEN -7777
WHEN NSOL.SS_CODE = 'OPL' THEN -6666
ELSE -7777
END) AS BIGINT) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,CASE WHEN NP_BPC.ACV_FLG='Y' THEN 'ACV' ELSE 'TCV' END AS BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD,
 /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
CASE WHEN WPT.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD IN ('AI_DEDICATED','AI_CAPABLE_INTENT_YES') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
WPT.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
WPT.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
WPT.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT /* AI Bookings MVP4 */
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_WIPS_POS_TRANS WPT
INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE_PSPK  PSPK
ON WPT.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY=PSPK.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
AND WPT.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY=PSPK.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_TV 
WHERE DSV_BOOKINGS_FLG='N' AND END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00' GROUP BY 1 ,2)NPTLR
ON NPTLR.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=WPT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NPTLR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT NSOLNRT 
-----ON NSOLNRT.SK_SALES_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT =NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
ON case when NSOL.SS_CODE='CG' then NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT else NSOL.sk_opl_line_id_int end =case when NSOLNRT.SS_CD='CG' then NSOLNRT.SK_SALES_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT
else NSOLNRT.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT end
AND NSOLNRT.SS_CD=NSOL.SS_CODE
/* Added as part of ACV FY21 */
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_TV NP_BPC
ON NP_BPC.ITEM_KEY=WPT.PRODUCT_KEY
AND WPT.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE BETWEEN NP_BPC.START_TV_DATE AND NP_BPC.END_TV_DATE

LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_POS_ATR_FIX EL
ON EL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT = WPT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
/* Added as part of SFP Rel */
WHERE WPT.NET_PRICE_FLAG <>'Y'

UNION ALL

/* Added new Union as part of SFP Rel : SFP & Non-SFP segregation */
SELECT WPT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
, WPT.DISTI_TO_RESELLER_SO_NUMBER
, WPT.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PROD_PRICE_AMT
, WPT.TRANSACTION_DATE
, WPT.GLBL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT
, WPT.GLBO_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_LCL_AMT
, WPT.DIST_RPTD_SALES_REP_NAME
, WPT.DIST_RPTD_CISCO_SO_NUM
, WPT.DISTI_SO_LINE_NUMBER
, WPT.DISTI_2_CISCO_PO_NUMBER
, WPT.WHLSL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT
, WPT.WHSL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_LCL_AMT
, WPT.DISTI_SBMTD_CISCO_CONTRACT_NUM
, WPT.DST_SBMTD_CSCO_CTRCT_TYP_DESCR
, WPT.DISTI_2_DISTI_TRX_FLAG
, WPT.DISTRIBUTOR_REPORTED_DEAL_ID
, WPT.DISTRIBUTOR_PART_NUMBER
, WPT.DROP_SHIP_FLAG
, WPT.DISTI_RPTD_END_CUST_VAT_NUMBER
, WPT.DIST_RPTD_END_USR_EML_CT_NAME
, WPT.DIST_RPTD_END_USR_CONTACT_NAME
, WPT.DIST_RPTD_END_USR_CT_TEL_NUM
, WPT.END_CUST_TO_RESELLER_PO_NUM
, WPT.EXPORT_REFERENCE_NUMBER
, WPT.INSTALLATION_AMOUNT
, WPT.DISTRIBUTOR_INVOICE_NUMBER
, WPT.MAINTENANCE_AMOUNT
, WPT.MANAGED_SERVICE_AMOUNT
, WPT.MARKET_TYPE_CODE
, WPT.OFFICIAL_SALE_FLAG
, WPT.OTHER_CONSULTING_AMOUNT
, WPT.PRODUCT_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
, WPT.POS_TRX_LINE_PRODUCT_QUANT
, WPT.LINKSYS_FLAG
, WPT.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE
, WPT.PROFESSIONAL_SERVICE_AMOUNT
, WPT.RPTD_EXTENDED_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT
, WPT.RPTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT
, WPT.RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT
, WPT.RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT
, WPT.SVC_CONTRACT_CENTER_QUOTE_NUM
, WPT.SECOND_SOURCE_FLAG
, WPT.DST_RPTD_2ND_SRC_DST_CTRY_CODE
, WPT.DISTI_RPTD_2ND_SRC_DISTI_NAME
, WPT.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER
, WPT.DISTRIBUTOR_SHIP_DATE
, WPT.SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_PERCENTAGE
, WPT.POS_TRX_LINE_ACTIVE_FLAG
, WPT.TRANSPORT_AMOUNT
, WPT.VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT
, WPT.VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT
, WPT.VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT
, WPT.VALUATION_PRICE_LOCAL_AMOUNT
, WPT.DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE_NUMBER
, WPT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE
, WPT.POS_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CODE
, WPT.PROMOTION_NAME
, WPT.DISTI_RPTD_COST_UNIT_PRICE_AMT
, WPT.DISTI_RPTD_PROMOTION_NAME
, WPT.DISTI_RPTD_PROMOTION_TYPE_CODE
, WPT.POS_TRX_REBILL_FLAG
, WPT.RU_CAD_PO_NUMBER
, WPT.RU_RSLR_TO_DISTI_ACCOUT_NUMBER
, WPT.RU_RSLR_TO_DISTI_PO_NUMBER
, WPT.RU_DISTI_RPTD_SALES_ORDER_DATE
, WPT.RU_MANAGED_SERVICE_TYPE_CODE
, WPT.RU_SOLUTION_ID
, WPT.RU_SOLUTION_SOLD_DATE
, WPT.RU_SOLUTION_LENGTH_INT
, WPT.RU_DISTI_TO_SP_INVOICE_NUMBER
, WPT.RU_SP_TO_END_USER_INVOICE_NUM
, WPT.RU_RET_ORIG_BS_LST_U_PRICE_AMT
, WPT.RU_RET_ORIG_CST_U_PRICE_AMT
, WPT.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_SO_NUM
, WPT.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI2RSLR_INV_NUM
, WPT.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_INV_NUM
, WPT.DISTI_RPTD_CAM_NAME
, WPT.DISTI_RPTD_DISTI_WHSE_NUM
, WPT.BK_CAM_PARTY_KEY
, WPT.BK_DEAL_ID
, WPT.BK_LOCAL_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE
, WPT.BK_REBILL_POS_TRANSACTION_ID
, WPT.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
, WPT.BK_SECONDARY_RESELLER_ID
, WPT.RU_BK_RET_POS_TRANSACTION_ID
, WPT.POS_SOURCE_TYPE
, WPT.ELIG_FOR_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE
, WPT.RU_ALLOCATED_TYPE
, WPT.POS_RETURN_ROLE
, WPT.EDW_CREATE_USER
, WPT.EDW_UPDATE_USER
, WPT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
, WPT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
, WPT.BATCH_ID_INT
, WPT.PRODUCT_KEY
, WPT.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
, WPT.BK_BILL_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
, WPT.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
, WPT.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
, WPT.SOLD_TO_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
, PSPK.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
, WPT.SOLDTO_CONTACT_EMAIL
, WPT.REPORTED_RESELLER_CERT
, WPT.DUP_POS_TRANS
, WPT.SERIAL_NUMBER_STATUS_SUMMARY
, WPT.SOLDTO_CONTACT_TEL
, WPT.SOLDTO_CONTACT_NAME
, WPT.SERVICE_SO_NUM
, WPT.REPORTED_PARTNER_ID
, WPT.ADJUSTED_FLAG
, WPT.CISCO_TO_SP_SO_NUM
, WPT.ORIG_BATCH_ID
, WPT.SERVICE_PROVIDER_NAME
, -999 AS OPPORTUNITY_KEY
, WPT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
, WPT.CISCO_TO_SP_PO_NUM
, WPT.CERTIFICATION
, WPT.RESELLER_AREA
, WPT.ENDUSER_AREA
, WPT.PDB_PARTNER_ID
, WPT.PDB_PARTNER_STATUS
, Coalesce(WPT.PDB_PARTNER_TYPE, 'UNKNOWN')
, Coalesce(WPT.VERTICAL_MARKET, 'UNKNOWN')
, WPT.PRE_UP_VAL_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LC
, WPT.PRE_UP_VAL_NET_UNIT_PRICE
,WPT.GROSS_POS_REVALUED_USD_AMT
, Coalesce(WPT.BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT, -9999)
,Coalesce(WPT.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD, 'UNKNOWN')
, Coalesce(WPT.BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT, -9999)
, WPT.LINE_STATUS_CD
,WPT.PRDT_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT
, WPT.ACTION_CODE
, WPT.DML_TYPE 
/* Modified as part of SFP Rel */
,
CASE WHEN EL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN 
	EL.DV_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
ELSE 
	Coalesce(CASE WHEN IS_SERVICE_CONTRACT_POS_FLG = 'Y' THEN WPT.START_DATE ELSE NSOLNRT.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM END, Cast('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
END  AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
,
CASE WHEN EL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN 
	EL.DV_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
ELSE 
	Coalesce(CASE WHEN IS_SERVICE_CONTRACT_POS_FLG = 'Y' THEN WPT.END_DATE ELSE NSOLNRT.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM END, Cast('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
END  AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
/* Added as part of CG1 MARCH REL*/
CASE WHEN EL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN 
	ROUND(MONTHS_BETWEEN(DV_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,DV_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM))
ELSE 
CASE WHEN IS_SERVICE_CONTRACT_POS_FLG = 'Y' THEN 
case when COALESCE(WPT.SERVICE_PERIOD,'MO') IN 'DAY' THEN  (COALESCE(WPT.DURATION,0.000000)/365.00)*12.00 /*To convert days to months*/
            when COALESCE(WPT.SERVICE_PERIOD,'MO') IN 'YR' THEN  (COALESCE(WPT.DURATION,0.000000))*12.00 /*To convert years to months*/
            ELSE COALESCE(WPT.DURATION,0.000000) END 
ELSE Coalesce(NSOLNRT.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT,-999.000000) END
END  AS RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT,
/* Added as part of SFP Rel */
Cast(WPT.ORG_DISTI_RESELLER_SOL  AS VARCHAR(50)) AS DISTRI_EXTERNAL_SOL_NUM
,WPT.MAGIC_KEY AS MAGIC_KEY_ID
,WPT.INTERNAL_POS_FLAG AS CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG
,WPT.NET_PRICE_FLAG AS NET_PRICE_FLG
,CASE WHEN Coalesce(NSOLNRT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-7777) NOT IN (-6666,-7777)  AND 
          ( Coalesce(NSOLNRT.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM, Cast('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) <> Cast('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) 
          OR Coalesce(NSOLNRT.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT,-999) NOT IN (-999,0) )  
THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS IS_SERVICE_CONTRACT_POS_FLG
,CASE 
    WHEN WPT.INTERNAL_POS_FLAG='Y' AND NSOL.SS_CODE = 'CG' THEN COALESCE(NPTLR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-7777)
    WHEN WPT.INTERNAL_POS_FLAG='Y' AND NSOL.SS_CODE = 'OPL' THEN COALESCE(NPTLR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-6666)
    ELSE -7777 
 END AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,CASE WHEN NP_BPC.ACV_FLG='Y' THEN 'ACV' ELSE 'TCV' END AS BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD,
 /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
CASE WHEN WPT.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD IN ('AI_DEDICATED','AI_CAPABLE_INTENT_YES') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
WPT.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
WPT.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
WPT.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT /* AI Bookings MVP4 */
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_WIPS_POS_TRANS WPT
INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE_PSPK  PSPK
ON WPT.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY=PSPK.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
AND WPT.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY=PSPK.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_TV 
WHERE DSV_BOOKINGS_FLG='N' AND END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00' GROUP BY 1 ,2)NPTLR
ON NPTLR.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=WPT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NPTLR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT NSOLNRT 
------ON NSOLNRT.SK_SALES_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT =NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
ON case when NSOL.SS_CODE='CG' then NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT else NSOL.sk_opl_line_id_int end =case when NSOLNRT.SS_CD='CG' then NSOLNRT.SK_SALES_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT
else NSOLNRT.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT end
AND NSOLNRT.SS_CD=NSOL.SS_CODE
/* Added as part of ACV FY21 */
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_TV NP_BPC
ON NP_BPC.ITEM_KEY=WPT.PRODUCT_KEY
AND WPT.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE BETWEEN NP_BPC.START_TV_DATE AND NP_BPC.END_TV_DATE

LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_POS_ATR_FIX EL
ON EL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT = WPT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT

/* Added as part of SFP Rel */
WHERE  WPT.NET_PRICE_FLAG ='Y'
